warps.notes: Staircase up to 4F — at northeast area of floor

notes: 3F introduces the first item on the climb — a Full Heal at (3,14).
The stair layout shifts: the down stair is at center (10,14) and the up stair is offset northeast at (16,2).
This begins the staggered stair pattern that characterizes upper Tin Tower floors.
No NPCs or trainers on this floor.
The item ball at (3,14) is in the southwest corner — positioned as a reward for thorough exploration.

items.name: Full Heal
items.notes: Item ball (SPRITE_POKE_BALL). Script: TinTower3FFullHeal — itemball FULL_HEAL.

access_requirements.to_enter: Rainbow Wing (required to access 1F staircase, which chains through 2F to 3F).
access_requirements.note: No blocking mechanics on this floor itself.

notes: Tin Tower 3F is 10x9 blocks (20x18 tiles). It contains one object event: a Full Heal item ball at tile coordinates (3,14). The warp structure introduces the first stair offset — descent at (10,14) to 2F and ascent at (16,2) to 4F. This begins the maze-like stagger pattern where ascending and descending use different positions on each floor, requiring exploration of the full floor area. No NPCs, trainers, or scripted events beyond the item pickup.
